backend/main.mo: Defines core backend types and pagination helpers, including parishioners, sacraments, family members, localities, budget transactions, and storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence mapping features to involved files, components, and test IDs for PDF export functionality and UI consistency.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of various frontend components and pages, describing their roles and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Defines global Tailwind-based OKLCH theme variables for light and dark modes, setting colors and layout properties.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component handling authentication state, profile setup, theming, and error boundaries before rendering the main layout.
frontend/src/components/BaptismRecordDia: Dialog for creating and editing baptism records with detailed form fields, syncing state from existing records and submitting via backend hooks.
frontend/src/components/BudgetDialog.tsx: Form dialog for creating or editing budget transactions, handling fields like type, amount, date, category, and description. Syncs form state with an optional existing transaction and returns data on save.
frontend/src/components/CollectiveOfferi: Dialog for adding or editing collective offerings tied to a locality, including amount, date selection with a calendar, and automatic timestamp/year updates. Initializes state from an existing offering or defaults.
Runs several environment and backend diagnostics, including URL param checks, actor initialization, backend connectivity, and browser feature availability. Displays results with status indicators.
frontend/src/components/EventDialog.tsx: Dialog for creating or editing events with title, date, description, and dynamic task management. Allows adding and removing tasks before saving the full event object.
frontend/src/components/ExportPdfModeCon: Dropdown control offering two PDF export modes: exporting all data or only the selected record. Handles loading state and error toasts for both export operations.
frontend/src/components/FunctionAssignme: Dialog for creating or editing parish function assignments including title, description, address, assigned parishioner, and editable contact list. Supports adding, editing, and removing contact entries.
frontend/src/components/FunctionLocality: Dialog for creating or editing locality assignments with fields for name, description, and contact list management.
frontend/src/components/IndividualOfferi: Dialog for adding or editing individual offerings, including amount, date selection, and timestamp handling.
frontend/src/components/LetterDialog.tsx: Dialog for creating or editing letters with title and body fields, showing metadata when editing.
frontend/src/components/LocalityDialog.t: Dialog for managing locality data with fields for contact info and editable task lists.
frontend/src/components/MainLayout.tsx: Main application layout providing sidebar navigation, theme switching, logout, and rendering of section pages.
frontend/src/components/NoteDialog.tsx: Dialog for adding or editing notes with title, date, and content fields.
frontend/src/components/ParishionerDialo: Dialog for creating or editing a parishioner, including family members, sacraments, and individual offerings loaded via backend queries.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting the user to enter name and role, saving the profile through a backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/StartupErrorBoun: Error boundary that catches startup errors and displays a detailed error UI with reload option.
Dialog for adding or editing a statistic entry with date, attendance, and communion counts.
frontend/src/components/UnhandledErrorLi: Global listener that forwards unhandled errors and promise rejections to a provided callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating parish-related data using the actor API, covering parishioners, user profiles, events, budgets, anniversaries, and more.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color tokens and layout defaults.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates branded parish PDF documents by assembling styled HTML and triggering browser print functionality.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers and mounts the application root.
frontend/src/pages/BaptismsRegistry.tsx: Implements the baptisms registry UI with search, sorting, pagination, editing, deletion, and PDF export of records.
frontend/src/pages/Budzet.tsx: Provides monthly and yearly budget views with CRUD operations, calculations, dialogs, and PDF export support.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Displays parish statistics, budget summaries, events, sacrament counts, and anniversary data with filters and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/FunkcjeParafialne.tsx: Manages paginated parish function assignments for individuals and localities, including add, edit, delete, and PDF export. Handles dialogs, pagination, and state for selected items.
frontend/src/pages/Kartoteka.tsx: Displays and manages paginated parishioner records with search, edit, delete, view modes, and PDF export. Integrates offerings data and handles selection and dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Korespondencja.tsx: Handles creation, editing, deletion, search, and PDF export of correspondence letters. Manages selection and dialog state with CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Provides login via Internet Identity and access to diagnostics in a styled UI. Displays branding and login status.
frontend/src/pages/Miejscowosci.tsx: Manages paginated locality records with add, edit, delete, and PDF export. Includes form handling, dialog management, and parishioner-linked data display.
frontend/src/pages/Statystyki.tsx: Displays and edits parish statistics, including sacrament counts and computed totals. Supports add, edit, delete, and generating a PDF summary.
frontend/src/pages/Uwagi.tsx: Page component that lists, paginates, edits, deletes, and exports parish notes to PDF using dialogs and query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Wydarzenia.tsx: Page for managing events with pagination, CRUD actions, PDF export (all or selected), and event selection handling.
frontend/src/utils/anniversaries.ts: Utility functions computing parishioner anniversary summaries, formatting labels, and preparing anniversary text for PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/baptismRecord.ts: Utilities for converting baptism dates, creating default parent/annotation objects, and building normalized BaptismRecord payloads.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, containers, animations, and enabling plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: JSON storing project state for a parish record app, including existing PDF export features and pending feature requests. Contains metadata, feature lists, and project configuration details.
